summary: Backend (10/10) + Frontend smoke testing PASS for the new 4-level Comparative drilldown + RadarChart + dept cascade. All endpoints behave as specified; UI renders cylinder bars (with semantic green→red coloring), radar polygons and full 4-level drill (Station → DHANBAD → Platform No-1 → Ceiling Fan → FAN-9). Broken-axis (zigzag + ★) correctly applied to outlier (Paid Sleeping Pod 61.6★ at 2× p90). No blocking issues.

design_issues.screen: Comparative tab — Card B (Radar) for SA001
issues: When logged in as superadmin (SA001 has no department_id), the radar renders axes & legend but no polygons — backend correctly returns series=[] when there are no peers in a (nonexistent) dept. Consider showing a friendlier 'No peer data — admin has no department' note for admin-role viewers.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add admin/SA empty-state copy in Card B radar when user has no department_id (currently shows axes only).
OPTIONAL: Card C asset level shows just one bar when only 1 asset of that type exists at a location — works as designed but may want to combine with breadcrumb context-text.
critical_code_review_comments: comparative.py:_resolved_repair_hours filters by status=='resolved' and clamps to (f_dt, t_dt) using marked_working_at — correct semantics for MTTR. p90 computed AFTER groups built and AFTER empty stations filtered → consistent with what UI sees.
Empty-station exclusion at level=station (lines 587-588) only fires when ALL bars in a station have n==0 — correct; ensures stations with at least one repair surface.
Radar endpoint correctly anonymises peers for role==supervisor and uses marked_working_by for credit attribution (matches by_supervisor lens). is_self flag set per series.
Frontend ComparativeReportsPage:CardC drill stack pushes correct level transitions (station→location_summary→location_types→asset). On level=='asset' click, opens AssetHistoryDrawer — matches spec.

Frontend semanticColor() in ComparativeReportsPage uses peerMax-relative scale (0..1) → green/yellow/orange/red gradient — semantic, NOT index-based. Verified: Paid Sleeping Pod (highest) red; Watercooler (lowest) green.
CylinderBar broken-axis triggers when value > 2× p90 (line 49). Outlier rendered with zigzag SVG path + bold red ★ value label. p90 received from API response.
MINOR: ComparativeReportsPage useEffect deps include `assetTypeIds.join(',')` inline — works but eslint-disable comment is appropriate.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (cylinder-bar-chart, radar-chart, card-c-root, comp-dept, comp-stat all present; 4-level drill verified; stat picker toggle works; semantic coloring + broken-axis zigzag visible)

test_credentials: SA001/admin123 (verified working). SSE001/admin123 verified anonymises peers via backend test (response.anonymised==true, label='Peer N', supervisor_id=None).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=$(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL /app/frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2-) python -m pytest /app/backend/tests/test_comparative_drilldown.py -v. Login response key is 'token' not 'access_token'. The 4-level drill testid pattern: data-testid='cyl-row-{i}' for individual cylinders inside data-testid='card-c-root'; breadcrumbs are data-testid='card-c-crumb-{i}'. SA001 has no department_id → CardB radar will show axes only with empty polygons (expected). For peer-anonymisation visual test, login as SSE001 (Electrical/DHANBAD).
